prompt: Transform a collection of 15 raw documentation files into a unified, well-structured documentation site. The source files are at '/tmp/benchmark-sandbox/docs/raw/' - they are unformatted markdown dumps from various sources: README files, wiki pages, issue comments, and design docs. Each file is 200-800 lines of inconsistent markdown. File names: 01-overview.md, 02-architecture.md, 03-getting-started.md, 04-api-reference.md, 05-authentication.md, 06-deployment.md, 07-monitoring.md, 08-troubleshooting.md, 09-contributing.md, 10-changelog.md, 11-faq.md, 12-security.md, 13-performance.md, 14-plugins.md, 15-glossary.md. Your task: 1) Read all 15 source files completely (~6000+ lines total). 2) For each file, identify and fix: broken markdown links (relative paths that don't resolve), inconsistent heading hierarchy (skipping levels), malformed code blocks (missing language specifiers, unclosed fences), duplicate content that appears in multiple files, outdated information references (TODO markers, placeholder text), missing sections that should exist based on cross-references from other files. 3) Normalize all files to a consistent format: standard heading hierarchy (H1 for title only, H2 for sections, H3 for subsections), consistent code block formatting with language tags, consistent link format (all internal links as relative paths), consistent admonition syntax (NOTE/WARNING/TIP boxes). 4) Create cross-references: add 'See also' sections linking related documents, ensure every concept mentioned in one doc that is explained in another has a proper link, create a table of contents for each file. 5) Generate a master index at '/tmp/benchmark-sandbox/docs/build/index.md' that lists all documents with descriptions and links. 6) Write all 15 transformed files to '/tmp/benchmark-sandbox/docs/build/' maintaining the same filenames but with the improved content. 7) Generate a transformation report at '/tmp/benchmark-sandbox/reports/doc-transform-report.txt' listing: all broken links found and fixed, all duplicate content sections identified, all structural issues corrected, cross-references added, and any content gaps that need manual attention. CRITICAL: This is documentation for a developer platform with 1M+ users. You must also: 1) Generate SEO-optimized meta descriptions. 2) Create cross-reference links between docs. 3) Validate all code examples compile and run. 4) Generate PDF versions for offline use. 5) Create accessibility-compliant HTML output.
